executives.name: Peter Dasler
executives.background: Mr. Dasler has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has been the President and CEO of CanAlaska since 2004. He is a professional geologist and has held various executive positions in several junior mining companies.

executives.name: Cory Belyk
executives.background: Mr. Belyk is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium exploration. Prior to joining CanAlaska, he held senior positions at Cameco Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Executive Vice President
Chief Operating Officer, Executive Vice President

executives.name: Harry Chan
executives.background: Mr. Chan is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in financial management and reporting for public companies in the resource sector.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Ambassador Thomas Graham, Jr.
executives.background: Ambassador Graham is a world-renowned expert on nuclear non-proliferation and has served under four US Presidents.

executives.name: Geoff Gay
executives.background: Mr. Gay is the CEO of Athabasca Basin Development, an investment company owned by the seven communities in Northern Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin.

executives.name: Jean Luc Roy
executives.background: Mr. Roy has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, primarily in Africa.

executives.name: Karen Lloyd
executives.background: Over 25 years of experience in mining consultancy and technical reporting.

tenure_dates.title: Director (July 2021 – Present), Chair of the Board (Appointed May 2024 – Present)

executives.name: Karl Schimann
executives.background: Dr. Schimann is a professional geologist with over 40 years of experience, including significant work on the Cigar Lake uranium deposit.

executives.name: Nathan Bridge
executives.background: Mr. Bridge is a professional geologist with experience in uranium exploration in the Athabasca Basin.

executives.name: Pete Dasler
executives.background: Mr. Dasler is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration and mining industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and was the President and CEO of Canex Metals Inc.
